query:
UPDATE atolls SET
  overview = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Laamu Atoll' THEN 'Laamu Atoll is a premier destination for surfers and adventure seekers, known for its consistent waves and laid-back island atmosphere. The atoll combines excellent surfing conditions with pristine diving and snorkeling opportunities. With a mix of luxury resorts and local guesthouses, Laamu offers authentic experiences in a less-commercialized setting, making it perfect for travelers seeking adventure and genuine cultural immersion.'
    WHEN name = 'Gaafu Atoll' THEN 'Gaafu Atoll is the largest atoll in the Maldives, offering vast expanses of pristine waters and diverse marine ecosystems. The atoll is known for its excellent diving conditions, remote location, and authentic local experiences. With fewer tourists and more undeveloped islands, Gaafu provides an exclusive escape for travelers seeking solitude, adventure, and genuine cultural encounters in a less-commercialized setting.'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Atoll' THEN 'Addu Atoll, also known as Seenu, is the southernmost atoll in the Maldives and offers a unique blend of history, culture, and natural beauty. The atoll is known for its WWII wrecks, excellent diving conditions, and authentic local experiences. With its own airport and diverse attractions, Addu provides an excellent alternative to more crowded northern atolls, offering adventure, history, and genuine cultural immersion.'
    WHEN name = 'Huvadhoo Atoll' THEN 'Huvadhoo Atoll is a remote and exclusive destination perfect for adventurous travelers seeking pristine natural beauty and authentic experiences. The atoll features pristine dive sites, remote islands, and minimal tourism infrastructure, making it ideal for those seeking solitude and genuine exploration. With its untouched marine ecosystems and friendly local communities, Huvadhoo offers an exclusive escape from commercialized tourism.'
    ELSE overview
  END,
  highlights = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Laamu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"World-Class Surfing","description":"Consistent waves and perfect conditions for all skill levels"},{"title":"Laid-Back Atmosphere","description":"Relaxed island vibe with authentic local culture"},{"title":"Excellent Diving","description":"Pristine dive sites with abundant marine life"},{"title":"Adventure Activities","description":"Diverse water sports and outdoor activities"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Gaafu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Largest Atoll","description":"Vast expanses of pristine waters and diverse marine life"},{"title":"Remote Location","description":"Less-visited atoll with authentic local experiences"},{"title":"Excellent Diving","description":"Pristine dive sites with abundant marine species"},{"title":"Exclusive Atmosphere","description":"Fewer tourists and more undeveloped natural beauty"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"WWII Wrecks","description":"Historic shipwrecks providing unique diving experiences"},{"title":"Excellent Diving","description":"Pristine dive sites with strong currents and abundant marine life"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Authentic Maldivian experiences with friendly communities"},{"title":"Alternative Gateway","description":"Own airport providing alternative entry point to Maldives"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Huvadhoo Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Remote Location","description":"Pristine and untouched atoll with minimal tourism"},{"title":"Pristine Diving","description":"Excellent dive sites with abundant marine life"},{"title":"Authentic Experiences","description":"Genuine local culture and island communities"},{"title":"Natural Beauty","description":"Unspoiled beaches and marine ecosystems"}]'
    ELSE highlights
  END,
  activities = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Laamu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Surfing","description":"Ride consistent waves in perfect conditions","emoji":"🏄"},{"title":"Diving","description":"Explore pristine dive sites with diverse marine ecosystems","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Discover colorful coral reefs and tropical fish","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Experience authentic island life and traditions","emoji":"🏝️"},{"title":"Fishing","description":"Try traditional fishing methods with local guides","emoji":"🎣"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Gaafu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Diving","description":"Explore pristine dive sites with diverse marine ecosystems","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Discover colorful coral reefs and tropical fish","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Experience authentic Maldivian island communities","emoji":"🏝️"},{"title":"Photography","description":"Capture stunning natural landscapes and marine life","emoji":"📸"},{"title":"Relaxation","description":"Enjoy peaceful island atmosphere and pristine beaches","emoji":"🧘"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Wreck Diving","description":"Explore historic WWII shipwrecks and underwater artifacts","emoji":"⚓"},{"title":"Diving","description":"Dive pristine sites with diverse marine ecosystems","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Discover colorful coral reefs and tropical fish","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Experience authentic island life and traditions","emoji":"🏝️"},{"title":"Photography","description":"Capture stunning underwater and landscape photography","emoji":"📸"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Huvadhoo Atoll' THEN '[{"title":"Diving","description":"Explore pristine dive sites with diverse marine ecosystems","emoji":"🤿"},{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Discover colorful coral reefs in pristine waters","emoji":"🏊"},{"title":"Local Culture","description":"Experience authentic Maldivian island life","emoji":"🏝️"},{"title":"Photography","description":"Capture stunning natural landscapes and marine life","emoji":"📸"},{"title":"Relaxation","description":"Enjoy peaceful island atmosphere and pristine beaches","emoji":"🧘"}]'
    ELSE activities
  END,
  accommodation = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Laamu Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Premium properties with excellent facilities and service","priceRange":"$600-$2000 per night"},{"type":"Mid-Range Resorts","description":"Comfortable resorts with good amenities","priceRange":"$300-$800 per night"},{"type":"Surf Camps","description":"Specialized accommodation for surfers with board rental","priceRange":"$100-$400 per night"},{"type":"Local Guesthouses","description":"Budget-friendly authentic accommodation","priceRange":"$50-$200 per night"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Gaafu Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Exclusive properties in remote locations with premium service","priceRange":"$700-$2500 per night"},{"type":"Mid-Range Resorts","description":"Comfortable resorts with good facilities","priceRange":"$300-$900 per night"},{"type":"Local Guesthouses","description":"Budget-friendly authentic accommodation on local islands","priceRange":"$50-$200 per night"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Premium properties with excellent amenities and service","priceRange":"$500-$1800 per night"},{"type":"Mid-Range Resorts","description":"Comfortable resorts with good facilities","priceRange":"$250-$700 per night"},{"type":"Local Guesthouses","description":"Budget-friendly authentic accommodation","priceRange":"$50-$200 per night"}]'
    WHEN name = 'Huvadhoo Atoll' THEN '[{"type":"Luxury Resorts","description":"Exclusive properties in remote locations with premium service","priceRange":"$800-$2500 per night"},{"type":"Local Guesthouses","description":"Budget-friendly authentic accommodation on local islands","priceRange":"$50-$200 per night"}]'
    ELSE accommodation
  END,
  transportation = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Laamu Atoll' THEN '120-150 minutes by speedboat from Malé International Airport'
    WHEN name = 'Gaafu Atoll' THEN '150-180 minutes by speedboat from Malé or domestic flight'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Atoll' THEN 'Domestic flight from Malé (1 hour) or 4-5 hours by speedboat'
    WHEN name = 'Huvadhoo Atoll' THEN '180-210 minutes by speedboat from Malé or domestic flight'
    ELSE transportation
  END,
  bestSeason = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Laamu Atoll' THEN 'March to October for best surfing conditions; November to February for diving'
    WHEN name = 'Gaafu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather and diving conditions'
    WHEN name = 'Addu Atoll' THEN 'February to March for best diving conditions; Year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Huvadhoo Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather and diving conditions'
    ELSE bestSeason
  END
WHERE name IN ('Laamu Atoll', 'Gaafu Atoll', 'Addu Atoll', 'Huvadhoo Atoll');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute UPDATE atolls SET
